name: Outside Ferny's Place
description:
You are on the small cobblestoned main street of Bree.  The street is barely
populated here.  It is as if everyone in town avoids this place.  You see a
ratty house to the south and a sign on the gate that says "Ferny".  You
remember one of the guards saying something about a ratty old man named Ferny.
To the east is the southern gate of Bree and the continuation of the Great East
Road, now known as the Greenway.
